mapper.insert: INSERT INTO slot (store_id, bay_id, `date`, time_slot, status, version) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{bayId}, #{date}, #{timeSlot}, 'HOLDING', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, store_id, bay_id, `date`, time_slot, status, version FROM slot WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND `date` = #{date} ORDER BY bay_id, time_slot
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM slot WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
